---
title: "Data Cleaning Protocol"
subtitle: "Levels 0–2: standardization, deduplication, and quality control"
date: today
toc: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
The canonical protocol lives in [`pre-processing/data_cleaning_protocol.md`](https://github.com/wx-ecology/barrierproject.github.io/blob/main/pre-processing/data_cleaning_protocol.md). This page is rendered from that file — edit there, not here.
:::

{{< include ../pre-processing/data_cleaning_protocol.md >}}
